title: Delightfully Sweet Treacle Tart
description: A classic English dessert featuring a rich treacle filling in a buttery pastry crust.
instructions: Roll out the pastry dough and place in a 23cm tart pan.
Bake the pastry for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
In a saucepan, combine treacle, brown sugar, eggs, milk, and vanilla extract (if using).
Heat the mixture over low heat, whisking constantly, until smooth.
Pour the treacle mixture into the baked pastry crust.
Bake for an additional 25-30 minutes or until the filling is set.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with flaky sea salt (if using).
